description: Unit test specifications for the TemplateFactory class, testing its HTML generation, sanitization, content management, and class handling.

classes.name: TemplateFactory
classes.description: A class responsible for creating and managing HTML templates with content and sanitization options.

methods.name: toHtml
methods.description: Generates an HTML element from the template with applied content and classes.

methods.name: getContent
methods.description: Retrieves the current content entries as an array.

methods.name: hasContent
methods.description: Checks if the template has any non-empty content.

methods.name: changeContent
methods.description: Updates the content of the template with new entries.
